description: A perfect option to go with your dresses, this clutch from lino perros comes with a glossy upper and a spacious inner to hold your party essentials.Dimensions: 12 cm x 26 cmMade of textured fabric with a fabric liningA flap to hold the clutch together with magnetic button closureCrystal embellishment on the front of the flapOne main compartment with an insert pocketDetachable chain strap for ease of carryingCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
